rootFurther.para1:
Amid the rapid transformations driven by the AI era and increasingly demanding client expectations, Sun* has chosen a strategy of capability diversification — striving not only to excel within each domain, but also to reach a higher goal where every Sunner becomes a “problem-solver”: an expert at resolving challenges, finding solutions for every project, client, and societal need.
Inspired by this diversity of capabilities, the flexibility to grow, and the spirit of digging deeper to break through in the AI era, “Root Further” was chosen as the official theme of the Sun* Annual Awards 2025.
Beyond its surface meaning, “Root Further” is the journey of continuously reaching further, planting roots deeper, and touching the hidden “geological” layers beneath in order to survive, rise, and nurture the ever-burning passion for creating value that defines every Sunner. Borrowing the image of roots that push steadily deeper into the earth — weaving powerfully through each layer of “sediment” to absorb what is most essential — Sunners are likewise “absorbing” nutrients from the era and market challenges to reinvent themselves daily, expand their capabilities, and firmly take root in the AI era: an entirely new “geological” layer, complex and unpredictable, yet brimming with boundless potential and opportunity.
rootFurther.quote: “A tree with deep roots fears no storm”
rootFurther.quoteAuthor: (Deeply rooted trees fear no storms - English proverb)
rootFurther.para2:
When the storm comes, only trees with sufficiently deep roots can stand firm. An organization composed of individuals who are confident in their diverse capabilities, ready to create and embrace challenges, and in command of change — such an organization not only withstands disruption but also leverages every advantage to conquer the challenges of the times. More than just a name for a new chapter in organizational development, “Root Further” is also an encouragement: urging each of us to dare to believe in ourselves, to dig deeper, to unlock every potential, to break through limitations, and to become the most versatile and outstanding version of ourselves. Because in the AI era, diverse capabilities and leveraging the power of the times are the prerequisite for lasting growth.
No one knows in advance how many hidden “geological” layers remain buried in the depths of the technology industry and modern market. But one thing is certain: when “Root Further” becomes a core spirit, we will not be afraid — we will instead feel excited in the face of any uncharted territory on the journey ahead. Because we always believe that within those very boundless expanses, wonders and opportunities to rise are waiting for us.

kudosSection.label: Recognition movement
kudosSection.title: Sun* Kudos
kudosSection.description:
NEW IN SAA 2025
A colleague recognition and appreciation activity — held for the first time for all Sunners. The activity will be launched in November 2025, encouraging Sunners to share words of recognition and appreciation for colleagues on the system announced by the Organizing Committee. This will serve as material for the Heads Council to reference during the selection process.

submit.placeholder: Who would you like to thank and recognize today?

campaign.title: Double-hearts day – spread twice the love!
campaign.desc: From 00:00 on 20/12 to 23:59 on 25/12, every heart you receive is doubled.

new.title: 1–4 people sent you Kudos
new.desc: The journey of spreading good things begins — the first words of thanks and recognition have found you.

rising.title: 5–9 people sent you Kudos
rising.desc: Your presence is growing in your teammates' hearts through your kindness and dedication.

super.title: 10–20 people sent you Kudos
super.desc: You've become a trusted and beloved icon — always ready to help and remembered by many teammates.

legend.title: More than 20 people sent you Kudos
legend.desc: You've become a legend — leaving an unforgettable mark on the team through your heart and actions.

campaign.title: Campaign x2
campaign.desc: During the special campaign period, every heart you receive is worth double (x2 hearts).

stars.one: You have received 10 or more Kudos. Keep it up!
stars.two: You have received 20 or more Kudos. You are shining!
stars.three: You have received 50 or more Kudos. You are a Sun* star!

top-talent.title: Top Talent
top-talent.desc: The Top Talent award honors all-rounded outstanding individuals — people who relentlessly affirm solid professional expertise and superior work performance, consistently delivering value beyond expectations and earning high regard from clients and teammates alike. Ready to take on any mission the organization entrusts to them, they are a constant source of inspiration, driving motivation and creating a positive impact across the whole team.

top-project.title: Top Project
top-project.desc: The Top Project award honors outstanding project teams whose business results exceed expectations, with optimal operational efficiency and a dedicated working spirit. These are projects of high technical complexity that optimize resources and costs well, propose valuable ideas for clients, deliver superior profit, and earn positive client feedback. Members strictly follow internal development standards throughout the project, forming a model of excellence and professionalism.

top-project-leader.title: Top Project Leader
top-project-leader.desc: The Top Project Leader award honors outstanding project managers — people who combine solid management capability, a powerful ability to inspire, and an “Aim High – Be Agile” mindset across every problem and context. Under their leadership, members not only overcome challenges together and reach their goals, but also keep the flame of enthusiasm and the Wasshoi spirit alive, growing into the finest, happier version of themselves.

best-manager.title: Best Manager
best-manager.desc: The Best Manager award honors exemplary leaders — those who guided their teams to results beyond expectations, with outstanding impact on business performance and the organization's sustainable growth. Under their leadership, the team always conquers and masters every goal through multitasking capability, effective coordination, and a flexible technology-application mindset in the digital era. They inspire the team to become confident and full of energy, ready to embrace — and even lead — revolutionary change.

signature-2025-creator.title: Signature 2025 - Creator
signature-2025-creator.desc: The Signature award honors an individual or team embodying the distinctive spirit Sun* pursues in each era. In 2025, the Signature award honors the Creator — an individual or team with a proactive, sharp mindset who always sees opportunity within challenge and pioneers in action. Keen to problems, they quickly identify them and offer practical solutions that bring clear value to the project, client, or organization. With a creative mindset and the “Creator” spirit distinctive of Sun*, they not only respond positively to change but also proactively create improvements, helping shape new standards for how Sun* people create value.

mvp.title: MVP (Most Valuable Person)
mvp.desc: The MVP award honors the single most outstanding individual of the year — the representative face of the entire Sun* collective. They have demonstrated superior capability, enduring dedication, and far-reaching influence, leaving a strong mark on Sun*'s journey throughout the year. Beyond performance and results, they are a source of spreading inspiration — through their thinking, actions, and positive influence on the collective. The MVP embodies all the qualities of an elite Sun* person while carrying a great responsibility: to become the role model representing the people and spirit of Sun*, helping lead the collective toward new heights.
